name: vuln-scout
description: Claude Code plugin for whitebox security review. Stable: deterministic offline quick scan, shared findings.json with stable keys and hotspot-aware findings, SARIF/Markdown/HTML/bundle reports, suppressions, CI fail-on gate, Kuzushi parity. Beta: deep profile with Joern/CodeQL/Slither/Trivy/Checkov when installed. Experimental: auto-fix, PoC, mutation. Writes audit-plan.md and review-ledger.json for reviewer-driven workflows.
